message:
fix(search): Update tests for ParsedTerm subterms structure

Adjust query explanation tests to access pattern through the new
subterms array rather than the removed top-level pattern field:

- test_query_explanation_simple: Check subterms[0].pattern == "exact"
- test_query_explanation_leading_wildcard: Check subterms[0].pattern

These tests verify the ParsedTerm restructuring works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
